creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 234371
Message sent by salvadore@ to freebsd-quarterly-calls@

Since salvadore@ is helping take over status reports, there's no reason his automated calls should be held for moderation.

Can we have him added to the list of pre-approved senders?

I attached the message.eml, but I believe the mail address that needs to get added is salvadore@FreeBSD.org.
